# Retail Media Platform

## Epsilon Retail Media Platform

- [Forecasting overview](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/onsite-forecasting/forecasting-overview.md): Get started with Forecasting and jump to setup, saved forecasts, results, and troubleshooting guides.
- [Accessing Forecasting](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/onsite-forecasting/accessing-forecasting.md): Learn how to open Forecasting and move between its main areas.
- [Creating a forecast](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/onsite-forecasting/creating-a-forecast.md): Create a forecast with the setup wizard, configure inputs, and handle no-data responses.
- [Managing saved forecasts](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/onsite-forecasting/managing-saved-forecasts.md): Use the dashboard to find, open, and manage saved forecasts for your team.
- [Viewing results and exports](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/onsite-forecasting/viewing-results-and-exports.md): Review the latest forecast run, reopen saved results, and export available data for offline use.
- [Troubleshooting Forecasting](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/onsite-forecasting/troubleshooting-forecasting.md): Fix common Forecasting issues with access, team context, saved forecasts, and missing data.

- [Campaign-level reporting](https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/advertiser-reporting/campaign-level-reporting.md): Campaign reporting has been streamlined in the new interface, with key functions enhanced for improved usability.

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://help.citrusad.com/retail-media-interface/welcome-to-the-new-epsilon-retail-media-platform.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
